aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Ferguson HVAC due to gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed business information.
Add an FAQ section with questions relevant to HVAC services and solutions.

critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between website and GBP.
Missing regular posts or Q&A engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate due to a phone number discrepancy.
action_items: Update the phone number on the website to match GBP: (978) 657-7779.
Audit and correct NAP information across all online directories and listings.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks or troubleshooting

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Boston' or 'emergency HVAC solutions'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI models with detailed, structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and industry expertise to establish authority in AI-driven searches.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven visibility for Ferguson HVAC with our tailored AEO strategy.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Phone number mismatch and absence of FAQ/schema markup hinder AI model citations.
agency_pitch.solution: We will enhance structured data, create conversational content, and ensure NAP consistency to make Ferguson HVAC a top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.
